name: TAILGUT CYST

demographics.Histo: several types of epithelia + elements of intestinal epithelium, smooth muscle within cyst

dominant_finding: clear fluid / mucoid fluid with internal echoes
discriminating_features: well-defined thin-walled multicystic / unilocular cyst within perirectal space adhering to
clear fluid / mucoid fluid with internal echoes
thick enhancing wall ± surrounding inflammation / air-fluid level ← secondary infection

general: well-defined thin-walled multicystic / unilocular cyst within perirectal space adhering to
clear fluid / mucoid fluid with internal echoes
thick enhancing wall ± surrounding inflammation / air-fluid level ← secondary infection
